creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
Gentle hint (from the linked article): 

> … Please do not submit problem reports that simply state that a newer 
> version of an application is available. …

Also: the first of the two bug icons at the FreshPorts page presents a list of bug reports, in which we see that there is already a report.

*** This bug has been marked as a duplicate of bug 259359 ***
